sofa.label: Heritage Sofa
sofa.desc: Hand-stitched wool-blend upholstery over a solid walnut frame. Available in 12 fabrics.

coffee-table.label: Elm Coffee Table
coffee-table.desc: Book-matched elm slab on hand-forged hairpin legs. Each grain pattern is unique.

tv-unit.label: Media Console
tv-unit.desc: Solid oak with hidden cable management and soft-close drawers.

floor-lamp.label: Arc Floor Lamp
floor-lamp.desc: Spun-brass shade on a weighted marble base. Warm 2700K LED.

rug.label: Wool Area Rug
rug.desc: Hand-loomed New Zealand wool. Naturally stain-resistant.

styles.name: Minimal
styles.description: Cream sectionals, live-edge walnut, and floor-to-ceiling glass. Nothing competes. Everything belongs.

styles.name: Classy
styles.description: Soaring ceilings, exposed timber beams, raw concrete fireplace — commanding presence without pretension.

styles.name: Modern
styles.description: Olive velvet, hand-knotted kilims, hanging botanicals, and a Moroccan lantern. Layered and gloriously alive.

styles.name: Rustic
styles.description: Rough-hewn oak, terracotta, and amber candlelight. A room that slows the day down to something worth keeping.

table.label: Oak Dining Table
table.desc: 7cm solid white oak slab, hand-planed edges. Seats 8 comfortably.

chair.label: Walnut Chair
chair.desc: Turned walnut legs, padded seat in performance linen.

sideboard.label: Sideboard
sideboard.desc: Solid oak carcass with cane-fronted doors and blackened steel pulls.

pendant.label: Rattan Pendant
pendant.desc: Hand-woven natural rattan. Warm-white bulb included.

styles.name: Minimal
styles.description: A single statement table, paired chairs, and nothing more. Restraint as a design choice.

styles.name: Classy
styles.description: Dark wood, upholstered chairs, and a statement pendant. Every dinner feels like an occasion.

styles.name: Modern
styles.description: Concrete table, steel-framed chairs, and industrial lighting. Design that doesn't compromise.

styles.name: Rustic
styles.description: Long reclaimed pine table, mismatched wooden chairs, and a warm glow overhead.

bed.label: Platform Bed
bed.desc: Low-profile walnut frame with floating base. Available in UK King, Super King.

nightstand.label: Nightstand
nightstand.desc: Floating bedside in oiled oak, single drawer with soft-close mechanism.

wardrobe.label: Fitted Wardrobe
wardrobe.desc: Full-height solid oak with interior organisers and silent hinges.

lamp.label: Table Lamp
lamp.desc: Hand-thrown ceramic base, linen shade. 2400K warm light.

styles.name: Minimal
styles.description: White linen, bare walls, and a low platform bed. Sleep without distraction.

styles.name: Classy
styles.description: Upholstered headboard, layered linens, and walnut nightstands. Every night feels like a stay.

styles.name: Modern
styles.description: Charcoal walls, white bedding, and geometric furniture. A room that means business.

styles.name: Rustic
styles.description: Exposed beam headboard, chunky knit throws, and amber candlelight.

desk.label: Standing Desk
desk.desc: Solid walnut top on motorised sit-stand frame. Memory presets included.

chair.label: Task Chair
chair.desc: Ergonomic mesh back, walnut arms. Lumbar adjustment built in.

shelves.label: Open Shelving
shelves.desc: Wall-mounted solid oak planks on hand-forged steel brackets.

lamp.label: Desk Lamp
lamp.desc: Adjustable arm in blackened steel, 3000K warm light with dimmer.

styles.name: Minimal
styles.description: One desk, one chair, one lamp. Nothing to distract from the work that matters.

styles.name: Classy
styles.description: Leather-topped walnut desk, floor-to-ceiling shelves, and a reading chair. Power and taste.

styles.name: Modern
styles.description: Concrete desk surface, cable management, and task lighting. Built for deep work.

styles.name: Rustic
styles.description: Rough-sawn pine desk, natural wool rug, and warm lamplight. A room that inspires.

counter.label: Marble Worktop
counter.desc: Honed Calacatta marble on solid oak cabinetry. Brass hardware throughout.

island.label: Kitchen Island
island.desc: Waterfall-edge oak island with seating for three and integrated storage.

stool.label: Bar Stool
stool.desc: Solid walnut seat on blackened steel base. Counter and bar height.

shelves.label: Open Shelving
shelves.desc: Solid oak floating shelves on cast-iron brackets.

styles.name: Minimal
styles.description: Flat-front white cabinetry, integrated appliances, and a single marble worktop. Nothing extra.

styles.name: Classy
styles.description: Deep navy shaker doors, brass hardware, and a marble island. Classic, never dated.

styles.name: Modern
styles.description: Concrete-effect cabinetry, matte black fixtures, and open steel shelving.

styles.name: Rustic
styles.description: Tongue-and-groove painted cabinets, butcher-block tops, and a Belfast sink. Timeless warmth.
